title: Mark Price Stream for All market

blocks.text: Mark price and funding rate for all symbols pushed every 3 seconds or every second.
TradFi symbols will be pushed through a seperate message.

[
{
"e": "markPriceUpdate", // Event type
"E": 1562305380000, // Event time
"s": "BTCUSDT", // Symbol
"p": "11185.87786614", // Mark price
"ap": "11185.87786614", // Mark price moving average
"i": "11784.62659091", // Index price
"P": "11784.25641265", // Estimated Settle Price, only useful in the last hour before the settlement starts
"r": "0.00030000", // Funding rate
"T": 1562306400000 // Next funding time
}
]
